titleStmt.title: SII 34.19: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 19. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: Fragmentary. Seems that some Śivabrāhmaṇa priests received a gift from Araiyan Marundan of Nāgamaṅgalam. The donor is said to belong to the iḷaiya-tiru-amudavēlai-nilai, perhaps a regiment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmātu puṇarappuvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu malara tanniru patumalar mannavar cūṭa ma
nniya vurimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭi ceṅkōl cenṟu ticai tōṟum vaḷarpa veṅkali nīṅki
meyyaṟantaḻaippa kaliṅkaviriya kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkaḷāḻi varaiyāḻinaṭātti Iru cuṭaraḷavum O
rukuṭai niḻaṟṟi vīrasiṅṅāsaṉattu mukkōṟkiḻānaṭikaḷōṭu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōpparakecari panma
rāṉa c(ā)kkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacōḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 mūnṟāvatu virutarāja payaṅkara va
ttan pañcanativāṇanāna tillaināyakappaṭṭanum ceyapātamāṉa varuṇaci vappaṭṭanum mātavana
rumarutu paṭṭanum paramapuruṣan Etirkoḷpāṭipaṭṭanum Ivvaṉaivōm Innāṭṭu nākamaṅka
lattu Irukkum Iḷaiya tiruamutavēlai nilai Uṭai Aṟaiyan maruntan pakkal nāṅkaḷ
Itu panmā
heśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 34.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
